steps.title: Group like terms
steps.content:
Keep the signs from each polynomial, then combine only terms with the same power of $x$. Cubic terms combine with cubic terms, the quadratic term stays quadratic, the linear term stays linear, and constants combine with constants.

$$(8x^3+4x+9)+(7x^3+6x^2-3)$$

steps.title: Combine each power
steps.content: Add the cubic terms, keep the quadratic term, keep the linear term, and combine the constants. $$8x^3+7x^3=15x^3$$ $$9-3=6$$ So the expression is $$15x^3+6x^2+4x+6$$ The answer is D.
